children.heading: Report on initial review
children.label: a Report on initial review
children.text: Not later than , the Commission shall submit to the President, the Committee on Agriculture of the House of Representatives, and the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry of the Senate a report containing the results of the initial review conducted under .June 1, 1998section 7313(a) of this title

children.heading: Report on subsequent review
children.label: b Report on subsequent review
children.text: Not later than , the Commission shall submit to the President and the congressional committees specified in subsection (a) a report containing the results of the subsequent review conducted under .January 1, 2001section 7313(b) of this title
